info.title: pakfindata API
info.description: Backend API for PSX market data. Endpoints under /v1 follow the Phase 1 contract (auth required, pydantic models). Endpoints under /api are legacy Phase-0 routers retained during the migration.

get.description: Return every row in ``data_freshness``, freshest first.

schema.title: Response List Freshness V1 Freshness Get

get.description: Return one row by PK; 404 if no such domain.

All symbols' OHLCV for the latest available trading day.

If ``as_of`` is provided, returns rows for that specific date.
Otherwise the server picks the latest day with ≥100 symbols.

parameters.name: as_of

schema.description: Override the auto-detected latest trading day (YYYY-MM-DD)
schema.title: As Of

parameters.description: Override the auto-detected latest trading day (YYYY-MM-DD)

schema.title: Response Eod Latest V1 Eod Latest Get

get.description: Advancers / decliners / unchanged for a single date.
All symbols' OHLCV for a specific date.

schema.title: Response Eod For Date V1 Eod Get

get.description:
OHLCV history for a single symbol.

Default window when neither ``from`` nor ``to`` is supplied: last
90 days ending at the symbol's most recent row. 404 if the symbol
has zero rows at all (typo).

schema.title: Response Eod For Symbol V1 Eod  Symbol  Get

get.description: Latest snapshot for every index code in ``psx_indices``.

schema.title: Response List Indices V1 Indices Get

get.description:
Membership for an index at its latest effective date.

Returns 404 if the index code is unknown OR has no membership row
seeded yet (sync hasn't run for it).

schema.title: Response Index Constituents V1 Indices  Code  Constituents Get

get.description:
Daily history for one index, newest first.

Returns 404 if the index code is unknown (zero rows). Empty range
within a known code returns 200 with an empty list.

schema.title: Response Index History V1 Indices  Code  Get

get.description: Denormalized hero — KSE-100 quote, 52w range, and breadth.

schema.title: Response Top Gainers V1 Market Top Gainers Get
Response Top Losers V1 Market Top Losers Get
Response Volume Leaders V1 Market Volume Leaders Get

get.description: Bundle of symbols near 52w high and near 52w low (Q3).

schema.title: Response Sector Leaderboard V1 Market Sector Leaderboard Get

get.description: Top symbols by turnover (close × volume) for the latest trading day.

schema.title: Response Value Leaders V1 Market Value Leaders Get

get.description:
One row per symbol with rounded daily change % — feeds the
Market Pulse change-distribution histogram.

schema.title: Response Change Distribution V1 Market Change Distribution Get

get.description:
Recent corporate announcements (company_announcements with a
corporate_announcements fallback).

schema.title: Response Announcements V1 Market Announcements Get

get.description:
Latest snapshot from ``analytics_market_snapshot``.

This is the point-in-time aggregate the Dashboard analytics widget
consumes. 404 if no snapshot has been computed yet (empty table).

Macro rates strip (SBP policy, KIBOR-3M, T-Bill-3M, PKRV-10Y) + FX.

Missing data points return ``null`` for that field — never fabricated,
never carried-forward.
Most recent ``sync_runs`` rows, newest first.

schema.title: Response Sync Runs V1 Sync Runs Get

post.description: Enqueue a job; returns 202 with the new job_id.

get.description: Recent jobs, newest first; optional status / type filters.

schema.title: Response List Recent Jobs V1 Jobs Get

post.description: Cancel a pending job. 404 if unknown; 409 if already running/finished.

get.description:
Get EOD OHLCV table statistics.

Returns counts, date range, and breakdown by source/processname.

List available CSV files.

Returns list of CSV files with their status (exists, in DB, etc.)

parameters.name: not_loaded_only

schema.description: Only return files not in DB
schema.title: Not Loaded Only

parameters.description: Only return files not in DB

post.description:
Load specific dates into eod_ohlcv table.

This is a synchronous operation for small batches.
For large batches, use /api/tasks/start-load instead.

get.description: Get information about a specific date.

post.description:
Start a background EOD load task.

Downloads and loads EOD data for the specified date range.
Returns immediately with a task_id to check status.

post.description: Sync today's FX snapshot (rates + KIBOR) into local DB.

Backfill historical FX rates from FX microservice into local DB.

Call this once on first setup, or anytime to fill date gaps.
Uses INSERT OR IGNORE — only fills gaps, never overwrites.

get.description: Public root banner.

Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description:
Recent corporate announcement (company_announcements with a
corporate_announcements fallback).

ChangeDistributionRow.title: ChangeDistributionRow
ChangeDistributionRow.description:
Histogram-bucket row from get_change_distribution.

One symbol → one rounded change percent. Clients bin these for the
breadth histogram.

EodBreadth.title: EodBreadth
EodBreadth.description: Advancers / decliners / unchanged for a single date.

EodRow.title: EodRow
EodRow.description: One row of daily OHLCV from ``eod_ohlcv``.

FiftyTwoWeekExtremes.title: FiftyTwoWeekExtremes
FiftyTwoWeekExtremes.description: Bundle near-high + near-low — one widget, one round-trip.

FiftyTwoWeekRow.title: FiftyTwoWeekRow
FiftyTwoWeekRow.description:
Row shape from get_52w_extremes: ``symbol`` + position percent.

``pos_pct`` is 100 at the 52-week high, 0 at the 52-week low.

FreshnessRow.title: FreshnessRow
FreshnessRow.description:
One row from the ``data_freshness`` table.

Fields mirror the SQLite schema column-for-column.

IndexConstituent.title: IndexConstituent
IndexConstituent.description:
Membership row for an index.

Mirrors the columns returned by
``db/repositories/instruments.get_index_constituents`` — weights
and share counts aren't stored on ``instrument_membership``, so
only identity fields surface here.

IndexHistoryRow.title: IndexHistoryRow
IndexHistoryRow.description: One day of history for an index.

IndexLatest.title: IndexLatest
IndexLatest.description: Latest row from ``psx_indices`` for a single index code.

JobDetail.title: JobDetail
JobDetail.description: Full row from the ``jobs`` table — used by GET endpoints.

KSE100Hero.title: KSE100Hero
KSE100Hero.description:
Dashboard's hero widget — KSE-100 quote + breadth + 52w range.

Fields drawn from ``psx_indices`` (via ``get_latest_kse100``) plus
breadth from ``eod_market_summary`` (via ``get_eod_breadth``).

LoadResult.title: LoadResult
LoadResult.description: Result of loading a single date.

MarketAnalytics.title: MarketAnalytics
MarketAnalytics.description:
Latest snapshot from ``analytics_market_snapshot``.

Point-in-time aggregate: breadth + volume + top mover symbols.
Used by Dashboard for the analytics widget.

Mover.title: Mover
Mover.description: Row shape returned by get_top_movers / get_volume_leaders.

RatesStrip.title: RatesStrip
RatesStrip.description:
Dashboard top-bar strip — key rates + FX, single round-trip.

Field shapes:
    sbp_policy_rate / _date              ← sbp_policy_rates
    kibor_3m_bid / _offer / _date        ← kibor_daily (tenor=3M)
    tbill_3m_cutoff / _date              ← tbill_auctions (tenor=3M)
    pkrv_10y_yield / _date               ← pkrv_daily (tenor_months=120)

A missing point leaves both value and date None — no fabrication.

StartLoadTaskRequest.title: StartLoadTaskRequest
StartLoadTaskRequest.description: Request to start EOD load task.

ValueLeader.title: ValueLeader
ValueLeader.description: Row shape from get_value_leaders — adds turnover to the Mover shape.
